ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical area */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data flag */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection point */,
  "data_source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the data source */,
  "data_entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES environmental_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_id") REFERENCES data_flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country or continent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographical area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographical area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the geographical area */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the geographical area in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the geographical area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_color" TEXT /* Color code for the flag */,
  "flag_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing data insights */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Results and findings from the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the quality check */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the quality check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the role is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental indicator */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was made */,
  "entry_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the entry */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_entry_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
